# Data Model Checklist: Provide Property Value Estimate API Endpoint

**Purpose**: Ensure entities and fields cover requests, results, caching, and errors.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/023-property-estimate-api/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Core Entities

- [x] CHK-DM-001 Estimate requests capture property identifier and request metadata.
- [x] CHK-DM-002 Estimate results include baseline, adjustments, final estimate, confidence, and warnings.
- [x] CHK-DM-003 Cache entries capture request signature, TTL, and dataset versioning.

## Error Modeling

- [x] CHK-DM-004 Structured error responses include error code, message, details, and correlation ID.
